jobs.title: Sustainability Consultant
jobs.summary: Support client ESG strategy, sustainability reporting, decarbonisation, and data management.
jobs.aboutRole: Engage clients on their sustainability objectives, conduct research and analysis, and support ESG reporting with frameworks like GRI, BRSR, and TCFD. Develop solutions and track sustainability KPIs across engagements.
jobs.aboutCompany: Infosys is a global leader in next-generation digital services and consulting.

jobs.title: Sustainability Consultant Intern
jobs.summary: Work with founders on carbon calculations, LCAs, and client presentations at a climate-tech firm.
jobs.aboutRole: Work directly with founders, engage with clients, analyse real sustainability data, and contribute to ESG and carbon accounting projects. Build client-ready presentations and help solve pressing sustainability challenges for businesses.
jobs.aboutCompany: Karbonwise is a climate-tech advisory firm working with companies across textiles, pharmaceuticals, and manufacturing to measure emissions and ESG.

jobs.title: Sustainability Reporting Specialist
jobs.summary: Direct environmental compliance, emissions reporting, and data-system integration for a global energy leader.
jobs.aboutRole: Lead preparation and submission of complex environmental reports (GHG, TRI, TSCA, DMR), and align metrics with global sustainability frameworks like GRI, SASB, BRSR, and TCFD. Use advanced analytics and visualisation tools to deliver actionable insights.
jobs.aboutCompany: ExxonMobil is a global energy leader with an extensive business support, research, and technology footprint in India.

jobs.title: Assistant Manager – Environment & Sustainability
jobs.summary: Solve sustainability and climate-change challenges across a wide range of advisory clients.
jobs.aboutRole: Solve the full spectrum of sustainability and climate-change challenges across clients. Focus on baseline data collection, stakeholder engagement, social risk assessment, and compliance against international standards including the IFC Performance Standards.
jobs.aboutCompany: Deloitte South Asia LLP provides market-leading professional tax, financial, and sustainability services.

jobs.title: ESG Consultant (Carbon)
jobs.summary: Execute environmental impact analyses, life-cycle assessments, and emissions-reduction pathways.
jobs.aboutRole: Conduct comprehensive analyses including carbon emissions tracking, carbon footprint assessments, environmental impact analyses, life-cycle assessments (LCAs), emissions reduction strategies, and climate risk evaluations.
jobs.aboutCompany: Apex Group is a global fund administrator and middle-office solutions provider.

jobs.title: Supply Chain ESG Coordinator
jobs.summary: Track international regulations like EU CBAM and manage supplier ESG data systems.
jobs.aboutRole: Support Optimas' global response to environmental regulations by managing supply-chain ESG data, coordinating supplier disclosures, and supporting robust data controls. Monitor ESG regulatory developments relevant to the business (EU CBAM, EU ETS, UK SECR, conflict minerals).
jobs.aboutCompany: Optimas Solutions is a global distributor of integrated supply-chain fasteners, components, and logistics support.

jobs.title: Associate – Impact & ESG
jobs.summary: Embed social-impact and ESG frameworks across a growing NBFC's lending portfolios.
jobs.aboutRole: Support the integration of Credit Saison India's ESG and impact-management framework in line with the company's lending strategy and rapidly evolving regulations and sector standards.
jobs.aboutCompany: Credit Saison India is a fast-growing, tech-enabled Non-Bank Financial Company (NBFC) lender established in 2019.

jobs.title: ESG & Sustainability Consultant
jobs.summary: Implement sustainability strategies, assessments, and ESG alignment for corporate clients.
jobs.aboutRole: Support organisations in implementing sustainability strategies, conducting assessments, and aligning with ESG standards. Qualifications include a Master's degree in Sustainability, Environmental Management, or Environmental Science.
jobs.aboutCompany: Growlity is a management consulting firm helping companies structure low-carbon and ESG policies.

jobs.title: Associate Consultant – Sustainability & ESG Reporting
jobs.summary: Deliver end-to-end sustainability disclosures, ESG research, and stakeholder communications.
jobs.aboutRole: Strengthen corporate sustainability positioning through end-to-end reporting, ESG research, strategic communications, and capacity-building. Craft focused strategies and action plans grounded in data-driven insights, aligned to BRSR and GRI.
jobs.aboutCompany: Sattva Consulting is a global impact consulting firm from India, established in 2009.

jobs.title: Worker Engagement Specialist (Contract)
jobs.summary: Freelance social-compliance role running digital worker-voice programs across western India.
jobs.aboutRole: Lead the deployment of digital worker-voice programs in Indian workplaces, deliver supplier platform training and technical support, and manage grievance case files, supporting investigation and remediation for social and SA8000 audits.
jobs.aboutCompany: EcoVadis is the leading global provider of business sustainability ratings, analysing environmental and ethical supply-chain risk.

jobs.title: Breathe ESG Fellowship (Intern)
jobs.summary: Structured mentorship and cross-functional project exposure at a climate-tech SaaS startup.
jobs.aboutRole: Gain hands-on experience in a dynamic startup environment. The fellowship offers mentorship, cross-functional exposure, and the opportunity to work on impactful projects across the tech and ESG platforms. Ideal for students and recent graduates passionate about technology and sustainability.
jobs.aboutCompany: Breathe ESG is an impact-tech startup using cloud-based software to streamline sustainability and carbon calculations.

jobs.title: Consultant – Climate Risk
jobs.summary: Advise banks and financial institutions on climate risk models, scenario analysis, and ESG integration.
jobs.aboutRole: Consult on risk processes including ESG and climate risk models, scenario and stress-testing frameworks. Develop transition plans aligned with sustainability targets, and run data analyses for risk assessments and ESG topics such as emissions calculations.
jobs.aboutCompany: KPMG India is a leading professional services firm providing audit, tax, and advisory services.

jobs.title: Consultant – Climate Change & ESG (Government Advisory)
jobs.summary: Support climate change, ESG, and sustainability advisory projects with government stakeholders.
jobs.aboutRole: Support climate resilience projects, conduct research on climate change and ESG, and develop reports and presentations. Engage stakeholders and support climate finance initiatives across government advisory engagements.
jobs.aboutCompany: KPMG India is a leading professional services firm providing audit, tax, and advisory services.

jobs.title: EHS – Sustainability Reporting
jobs.summary: Lead sustainability reporting, GHG inventory, and decarbonisation aligned with global standards.
jobs.aboutRole: Design and maintain sustainability reporting systems per GRI, SASB, and TCFD, and prepare annual sustainability reports and ESG disclosures. Develop the GHG emissions inventory per the GHG Protocol and monitor decarbonisation measures.
jobs.aboutCompany: Tata Electronics is part of the Tata Group, focused on electronics manufacturing.
